summary: Completed Phase 3 live analysis enhancement testing (xG, threat, pressure, trap detector). Backend API correctly returns _live_analysis field with kloppy/socceraction/soccer_xg inspired metrics. Frontend LiveAnalysisStrip renders correctly with 8-metric grid, verdict badges, and Spanish UI. All core functionality working.

minor_issues.issue: Timeout issues when refresh=true (30s timeout insufficient during peak load)
minor_issues.impact: Backend tests occasionally timeout, but API works correctly when called with longer timeout
minor_issues.workaround: Use refresh=false for cached data or increase timeout to 60s+

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/matches/live?sport=football returns _live_analysis field for all live matches
Backend: _live_analysis structure complete with minute, score, home, away, deltas, verdict, trap, _source fields
Backend: Per-side stats include xg_live, threat_index, pressure_rate, shots, shots_on_target, shots_in_box, possession, corners, dangerous, attacks
Backend: xG computation working (home: 1.64-1.89, away: 0.84 from shot quality decomposition)
Backend: Threat index computation working (home: 33-36, away: 21-22 from socceraction formula)
Backend: Pressure rate computation working (home: 0.15-0.16, away: 0.057-0.06 per minute)
Backend: Verdict labels valid (LIVE_VALUE_PUSH, BALANCED, INSUFFICIENT_DATA)
Backend: Trap field present (null when not triggered)
Backend: Basketball/Baseball matches do NOT have _live_analysis (football-only)
Backend: POST /api/live/reevaluate includes trap and live_analysis in response
Frontend: LiveAnalysisStrip renders for all 6 live football matches
Frontend: Verdict badge displays correctly ('EMPUJE CON VALOR' for LIVE_VALUE_PUSH)
Frontend: Verdict reason displays in Spanish
Frontend: All 8 metrics render (xG live, Amenaza xT, Presión/min, Tiros a puerta, Córneres, Ataques peligrosos, Posesión, Tiros en área)
Frontend: Emerald tone used for LIVE_VALUE_PUSH verdict
Frontend: Side label shows 'local' for home push
Frontend: Trap detail row NOT shown when trap=false (correct)
Frontend: Existing badges still render (LiveStateBadge: 6 found)
Frontend: Big Five filter works (0/6 when ON, 6 when OFF)
Frontend: LiveReevalPanel still present on live cards

success_percentage.backend: 95% (73/80 tests passed, 7 timeouts due to network/load, not code issues)

verdict.label: LIVE_VALUE_PUSH
verdict.reason_es: Empuje local sostenido en últimos minutos (xG 1.64 vs 0.84). Buscar valor en Over o línea del local.
verdict.reason_en: Sustained home push in late minutes (xG 1.64 vs 0.84). Look for value on Over or home lines.

trap_detector_status.trigger_conditions: minute>=70 AND odds<=1.45 AND pressure_ratio>=1.4 AND threat_ratio>=1.2
trap_detector_status.note: No live matches currently meet trap conditions. Trap detector logic verified in code review and backend smoke test mentioned in agent_to_agent_context_note.

frontend_rendering.reason_spanish: Empuje local sostenido en últimos minutos (xG 1.89 vs 0.84). Buscar valor en Over o línea del local.

backend_api.GET_matches_live_football: ✅ PASS - _live_analysis field present with complete structure
backend_api.POST_live_reevaluate: ✅ PASS - Includes trap and live_analysis in response
backend_api.xg_computation: ✅ PASS - Values computed from shot quality (1.64-1.89 home, 0.84 away)
backend_api.threat_index_computation: ✅ PASS - socceraction formula working (33-36 home, 21-22 away)
backend_api.pressure_rate_computation: ✅ PASS - Per-minute pressure calculated (0.15-0.16 home, 0.057-0.06 away)

frontend_ui.8_metric_grid: ✅ PASS - All metrics render (xG, threat, pressure, shots, corners, dangerous, possession, in-box)
frontend_ui.existing_badges: ✅ PASS - LiveStateBadge, LiveFreshnessBadge, ProvenanceBadge still render
frontend_ui.big_five_filter: ✅ PASS - Works correctly (0/6 when ON, 6 when OFF)
frontend_ui.sport_switching: ✅ PASS - Basketball/Baseball do NOT show LiveAnalysisStrip

notes: Backend API working correctly with kloppy/socceraction/soccer_xg inspired metrics
Frontend LiveAnalysisStrip renders correctly with Spanish UI
Trap detector logic verified in code (not currently triggered in live matches)
All 8 metrics display correctly in grid layout
